heading: Repealed. ,Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 654, § 1(12)65 Stat. 701
label: 419 Repealed. ,Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 654, § 1(12)65 Stat. 701
notes: Section, , , related to sale by Secretary of Agriculture of products of agricultural experiment station in Puerto Rico, and disposition of moneys derived therefrom. Similar provisions had been carried in prior Department of Agriculture appropriation acts back to and including that for the fiscal year ending (). Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:act May 5, 1945, ch. 10959 Stat. 14340 Stat. 1000June 30, 1919
